title: helichrysum ochraceum
intro: Helichrysum ochraceum is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum ochraceum can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, stress, and insomnia, and to promote overall well-being.
